text: 36MB — borderline but loadable. Let me push and you can try it:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input:
{"command": "# Remove the 553MB file, keep only compact
rm claude_captures/run_20260407_182127/viz_data.json
mv claude_captures/run_20260407_182127/viz_data_compact.json claude_captures/run_20260407_182127/viz_data.json
rm -f claude_captures/run_20260407_182127/viz_data_light.json

git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
add multi-turn capture (3 user messages, 110 iterations)

3-turn conversation: explore crates → find complex functions → suggest refactoring
110 API calls: 104 parent, 3 subagent, 3 internal
Shows message accumulation across turns (1200+ messages by turn 3)
Compact viz_data (36MB, stripped raw request/response data)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push 2>&1 | tail -3", "description": "Commit and push", "timeout": 120000}
